title: Ubiquiti UVC-AI-Pro - UVC AI Professional camera, 8MP, Black
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Bullet
description: Bullet camera AI Professional from Ubiquiti is a camera with 8MP resolution (3840 x 2160px at 30 fps), really large 1/1.8" sensor, varifocal lens 4.1 to 12.3mm , motorized 3x optical zoom, viewing angle 35 to 110° , integrated high-performance infrared LEDs for night vision vision, microphone, speaker , degree of protection IP65 against water and anti-vandal protection IK04. Camera for communication towards the network uses a Gigabit LAN port with support for power supply via 802.3af PoE with… UniFi Protect Controller is a powerful integrated IP video monitoring platform designed to work with UniFi Protect cameras and the UniFi Protect mobile app 4K resolution - 8MP, 3840 x 2160px at 30 fps 3x optical zoom IR illuminator with automatic IR cut filter Advanced AI detection : people detection, license plate reading and more Integrated audio microphone and speaker IP65 protection + anti-vandal IK04 Device Wall mount Gripping material
